tasks.subject: Task 0: Project scaffold and Cobra root command
tasks.description:
Buildable Go module, Cobra root command, global flags, output exit codes + typed errors.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["go.mod", "cmd/gam/main.go", "internal/cli/root.go", "internal/output/output.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./... && go run ./cmd/gam --help", "acceptanceCriteria": ["go build succeeds", "--help lists global flags"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Manifest spec types and addons.toml parsing
tasks.description:
AddonSpec/Manifest/SourceType, Load/Save, InstallName, Hash.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/manifest/spec.go", "internal/manifest/manifest.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/manifest/ -run TestManifest -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["round-trip parse/write", "Hash stable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Manifest validation
tasks.description:

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/manifest/validate.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/manifest/ -run TestValidate -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["rejects bad source", "requires per-source fields"]}
```
